name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America offers payday loans ($100-$500), installment loans ($100-$1,000), and title loans ($2,000-$25,000) with same-day funding at physical locations and online.
description_long:
Advance America is a nationally recognized lender specializing in short-term emergency cash solutions. The company operates physical store locations across the US, including the Jacksonville, FL branch at 1020-14 N. Edgewood Ave., and provides online lending options. Founded to serve consumers needing quick access to cash between paychecks, Advance America positions itself as a fully accredited company serving millions of customers.

The company offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans ($100-$500, 2-4 week terms), Installment Loans ($100-$1,000 with multiple payment options), and Title Loans ($2,000-$25,000 using vehicle equity as collateral). All products are available online or in-store, with same-day funding highlighted as a key offering. The Jacksonville location operates Monday-Thursday 10am-6pm, Friday 9am-6pm, and Saturday 9am-4pm. Advance America also offers Western Union services at this location.

Advance America differentiates itself through a 4.9 out of 5 rating based on 125,448 reviews, bilingual staff ("Hablamos español"), and simple application requirements (government ID, proof of income, checking account, SSN/ITIN). The company emphasizes customer service and trained staff to explain loan options. Online application capability allows consumers to avoid in-store visits.

However, consumers should note that the website does not disclose APR, fees, or repayment terms—critical information for evaluating these high-cost short-term loans. Payday and installment loans are typically associated with triple-digit APRs. Title loans require vehicle collateral with repossession risk. The company's reliance on customer reviews as its primary credibility marker (rather than regulatory compliance details) suggests limited transparency about loan costs.
pros: Same-day funding available for payday and installment loans up to $1,000
Title loans up to $25,000 based on vehicle equity, no employment restrictions
4.9/5 star rating from 125,448 customer reviews demonstrating consistent user satisfaction
Bilingual staff available at Jacksonville location; serves Spanish-speaking customers
Multiple product options ($100 payday loans through $25,000 title loans) for different needs
Online application available; no requirement to visit physical store
Simple application requirements (no mention of credit checks or minimum credit score)
Additional services like Western Union available at physical locations
cons: APR, interest rates, and fee structure not disclosed on website—typical payday/installment loans carry 300%+ APR
Title loans require vehicle collateral with repossession risk if payments missed
No information provided about state-specific lending regulations, caps, or consumer protections
Limited store hours (closed Sundays; latest weekday closing 6pm) may not accommodate all customers
Title loan partnership with third-party LoanCenter adds complexity to underwriting and servicing
best_for: Consumers needing $100-$500 in cash within 1-2 days for unexpected expenses
Vehicle owners seeking larger loans ($2,000-$25,000) willing to use car title as collateral
Spanish-speaking borrowers in Jacksonville seeking bilingual customer service
Customers uncomfortable with online-only lenders preferring in-person application and staff guidance
diagnosis: Advance America is best for consumers with immediate cash needs ($100-$1,000) and a valid checking account who can access physical stores or apply online. The critical caveat is that payday and installment loans carry undisclosed but typically very high APRs (300%+), making them expensive emergency debt; title loans pose collateral loss risk if payments default. Use only for genuine short-term emergencies, not recurring cash flow problems.
services: Title loans ($2,000-$25,000 vehicle-backed, partnership with LoanCenter)
Same-day funding (for payday and installment loans)

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
